name: paper-digest
description: Deep-read research papers and produce self-contained structured Markdown notes focused on the paper's story, concrete technical method, module-level design, formulas, experiments, limitations, and research inspiration.

interface.shortDescription: Deep-read papers into structured research notes
interface.longDescription: Read research papers closely and produce structured notes covering the paper story, technical mechanism, experiments, limitations, and research inspiration.
defaultPrompt: 精读这篇论文并整理成结构化笔记
提取论文的方法、公式、实验和局限
分析这篇论文对我研究方向的启发
